text.title: Platform Team Charter Template Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree gating whether platform-team-charter-template applies. Root question is a yes/no observable on the incoming task; branches name a concrete observable (`when`) and conclude either with a rule reference from 01-core-rules.xml or with a skip directive.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the org have ≥3 product teams AND a dedicated platform team is forming or repositioning?

example.description: When `yes AND new_team` holds, the tree concludes `rule:r1` — meaning the methodology applies via that specific rule. The agent should load the referenced rule from 01-core-rules.xml and follow it.
